answers.where: Battle arena on the Roblox-like studs/baseplate floor.
answers.action: Move with WASD, dodge with Q, and let the mech fire at drones.
answers.response: The Assault Walker shows target beams, weapon charge, stomp rings, recoil, and material glow while engaging drones.
answers.reward: Drone count and cooling meter show battle progress before salvage reward.
answers.game_look: The sourced mech silhouette, bright block world, colored beams, stomp rings, and readable combat HUD create a toy-like mech battler read.

issues.text: Assault Walker now has clearer attack beams, stomp/charge VFX, and whole-body recoil, but final authored rigged limb animation and lighting polish remain future visual work.
